status: DRAFT — awaiting J ratification per rule 9. N=18 tradeable UNTESTED (gate requires N>=20, gap>=15pp). 2 days short of N gate.

evidence.note_on_gap_evolution: Initial measurement at N=6: 45.2pp gap (inflated — Feb-Mar 2026 bearish regime concentrated in UNTESTED). At N=18: 26.1pp. Gap narrowed as April+May data added more UNTESTED days in recovery regime. Still well above the 15pp minimum threshold.

overall_calibration_at_62_days.note: ECE 24.28% — significantly above 10% target. Confidence is systematically over-stated, especially at high conf. Formula v2 (base x75 vs x100) brought max-conf days from ~55% down to 19.2% but ECE remains high. Bullish/bearish gap (69% vs 52%) persists — bearish days in choppy/recovery regimes are harder to call.

interpretation: When the battle level is UNTESTED (price never interacted with it during RTH), the swarm's directional thesis is regime/macro-driven, not level-confirmed. The 26.1pp accuracy gap at N=18 is consistent and stable — the initial 45.2pp reading at N=6 was inflated by regime concentration, but the signal persisted across both bearish (Feb-Mar) and recovery (Apr-May) regimes.

proposed_changes.description: Add UNTESTED battle level penalty to confidence formula
proposed_changes.draft_text: - battle_level UNTESTED (battle_grade from level_thesis output): -15 (level not in play today — directional thesis is regime-only, not level-grounded)
proposed_changes.rationale: Reduces conf by 15 points when the defining battle level has not been tested by price. Empirical basis: 26.1pp accuracy gap at N=18 tradeable UNTESTED days (44.4% vs 70.6% tested).

proposed_synthesis_narrative_flag.description: Add advisory text to synthesis_narrative when battle_grade == UNTESTED
proposed_synthesis_narrative_flag.draft_text: NOTE: Battle level {price} is UNTESTED — price has not interacted with this level today. Direction thesis is regime/macro-driven, not level-confirmed. Historical accuracy on UNTESTED-level days: 44% (vs 71% on TESTED days, N=18). Treat this as lower-conviction.

implementation_gate.status: PENDING — N=18, need 2 more UNTESTED tradeable days. Remaining backfill days (05-05 through 05-10) will likely provide 1-3 more. Gate expected to clear on next batch cycle.
implementation_gate.expected_n20_timing: Next swarm backfill batch (05-05 to 05-10 range). ~6 trading days remain in the queue.
